item.dc:creator: Allan Smith
item.description: Control of the House of Representatives could come down to four pivotal battleground races in Pennsylvania

media:content.media:text: President Trump Touts Inflation Focus In Pennsylvania
media:content.media:description: Rep. Rob Bresnahan, a Republican from Pennsylvania, is in a battleground race against Scranton Mayor Paige Cognetti this fall.

media:content.media:text: House GOP 3/4
media:content.media:description: Rep. Rob Bresnahan, a Republican from Pennsylvania, is in a battleground race against Scranton Mayor Paige Cognetti this fall.

media:content.media:text: Scranton Mayor Paige Cognetti in 2024.
media:content.media:description: Rep. Rob Bresnahan, a Republican from Pennsylvania, is in a battleground race against Scranton Mayor Paige Cognetti this fall.

media:content.media:text: Brian Fitzpatrick 3/27/26
media:content.media:description: Rep. Rob Bresnahan, a Republican from Pennsylvania, is in a battleground race against Scranton Mayor Paige Cognetti this fall.

item.title: Four swing House races in Pennsylvania loom large for both parties — and for 2028, too

item.dc:creator: Chantal Da Silva
item.description: A new burst of diplomatic action intensified Thursday in a push to break the deadlock between the United States and Iran.

media:content.media:text: TOPSHOT-IRAN-US-ISRAEL-WAR-PROTEST
media:content.media:description: Women hold Iran's national flag and photos of country's supreme leader Ayatollah Mojtaba Khamenei and his predecessor and late father Ayatollah Ali Khamenei during an anti-US and Israel protest at the Hafte Tir Square in Tehran on May 17, 2026.

media:content.media:text: Iran And US Remain In Stalemate Over Strait Of Hormuz
media:content.media:description: Nearly three months since the war began with U.S. and Israeli airstrikes on Feb. 28, Iran maintains a chokehold on the key waterway.

media:content.media:text: JD Vance arrives in Pakistan.
media:content.media:description: Munir welcomed Vice President JD Vance to Islamabad in Islamabad last month for talks that fell short of a peace deal.

item.title: Iran-U.S. diplomacy intensifies as Trump seeks ‘right answers,’ Tehran signals gaps ‘reduced’

item.description: An Air France flight headed to Detroit suddenly diverted to Canada over concerns that a Congolese passenger may have been exposed to Ebola. Meanwhile, the American doctor who tested positive for the virus is now in stable condition, according to the CDC. NBC’s Molly Hunter reports for TODAY.

media:content.media:title: Detroit-Bound Plane Diverted to Canada Over Ebola Concerns
media:content.media:description: An Air France flight headed to Detroit suddenly diverted to Canada over concerns that a Congolese passenger may have been exposed to Ebola. Meanwhile, the American doctor who tested positive for the virus is now in stable condition, according to the CDC. NBC’s Molly Hunter reports for TODAY.

item.title: Detroit-Bound Plane Diverted to Canada Over Ebola Concerns

item.dc:creator: Kayla Steinberg
item.description: Walmart reported positive earnings, but U.S. consumers are struggling with rising costs.

media:content.media:text: Walmart Reports Quarterly Earnings
media:content.media:description: A Walmart store in Hollywood, Fla, in 2025.

item.title: Walmart says U.S. consumers are under pressure from rising costs

item.dc:creator: Kayla Steinberg
Allie Canal
item.description: The stock market is near record highs, but there’s another corner of Wall Street that’s flashing warning signs: the bond market

media:content.media:text: US-ECONOMY-MARKETS-NYSE
media:content.media:description: The New York Stock Exchange on April 8.

item.title: As the stock market nears record highs, another corner of Wall Street flashes warning signs

item.dc:creator: Morgan Chesky
Tim Stelloh
item.description: Like schools across the U.S., the Islamic Center of San Diego had sought to prepare its students for the possibility that a gunman could breach its walls.

media:content.media:text: Islamic center of San Diego active shooter
media:content.media:description: Three people were killed, including an armed security guard, after two shooters entered the Islamic Center of San Diego on Monday and opened fire.

media:content.media:text: At Least 3 Killed In Shooting At Islamic Center of San Diego
media:content.media:description: Three people were killed, including an armed security guard, after two shooters entered the Islamic Center of San Diego on Monday and opened fire.

media:content.media:text: Community holds vigil after deadly mosque shooting in San Diego
media:content.media:description: Three people were killed, including an armed security guard, after two shooters entered the Islamic Center of San Diego on Monday and opened fire.

item.title: Teacher’s assistant at San Diego mosque recalls students’ bravery as gunmen banged on doors

item.description: Acting U.S. Attorney General Todd Blanche discusses the indictment of former Cuban President Raúl Castro, charged with the 1996 downing of two civilian planes. He called the move a "big step forward" for Cuban Americans.

media:content.media:title: Acting Attorney General Todd Blanche says Castro indictment is 'big step forward'
media:content.media:description: Acting U.S. Attorney General Todd Blanche discusses the indictment of former Cuban President Raúl Castro, charged with the 1996 downing of two civilian planes. He called the move a "big step forward" for Cuban Americans.

item.title: Acting Attorney General Todd Blanche says Castro indictment is 'big step forward'

item.description: Stephen Colbert is set to host his final episode of “The Late Show” Thursday as the institution comes to an end after more than three decades. The details of his grand finale, including who the guests will be, remain tightly under wraps. NBC’s entertainment correspondent Chloe Melas reports for TODAY.

media:content.media:title: Final Episode of 'Late Show With Stephen Colbert' Set to Air
media:content.media:description: Stephen Colbert is set to host his final episode of “The Late Show” Thursday as the institution comes to an end after more than three decades. The details of his grand finale, including who the guests will be, remain tightly under wraps. NBC’s entertainment correspondent Chloe Melas reports for TODAY.

item.title: Final Episode of 'Late Show With Stephen Colbert' Set to Air

item.dc:creator: Berkeley Lovelace Jr.
item.description: Eli Lilly’s highly anticipated new weight loss drug, retatrutide, helped people lose up to 30% of their body weight, about 85 pounds, in a late-stage clinical trial, the drugmaker said in a news release Thursday

media:content.media:text: Eli Lilly headquarters in Indianapolis
media:content.media:description: Eli Lilly headquarters in Indianapolis.

item.title: People lost up to 85 pounds on Lilly’s experimental weight loss drug, company says

item.dc:creator: Jeremy Olshan
item.description: My journey through Shakespeare was guided by “Star Trek” star Patrick Stewart, who just recorded a new audiobook of the sonnets, and Claude AI.
item.title: Patrick Stewart, AI and I encountered the Bard. Resistance was futile.

item.description: On the sidelines of the Trump-Xi Summit in Beijing, NBC News' Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio to discuss China policy, the war with Iran, the future of Cuba, and more.

media:content.media:title: Extended Interview: Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio
media:content.media:description: On the sidelines of the Trump-Xi Summit in Beijing, NBC News' Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio to discuss China policy, the war with Iran, the future of Cuba, and more.

item.title: Extended Interview: Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio

item.dc:creator: Maggie Vespa
Kailani Koenig
Patrick Smith
item.description: A man from New York State who was on board the Hondius cruise ship — which became the center of an outbreak of hantavirus that killed three people earlier this month — reveals the Nebraska health facility where he’s being quarantined feels like “prison.”The 30-year-old man, who asked not to be named due to the harassment of other passengers, told NBC News by phone that he wants to be able to quarantine at home.

media:content.media:text: US Hantavirus-Ship
media:content.media:description: Nebraska Medicine's Davis Global Center is seen on Sunday, May 10,2026 in Omaha, Neb. where American passengers from the hantavirus-stricken cruise ship will quarantine.

media:content.media:text: Hantavirus Outbreak
media:content.media:description: U.S. passengers from the cruise ship MV Hondius arrive at the University of Nebraska Medical Center Davis Global Center, in Omaha, Neb. on Monday.

item.title: American who was on the hantavirus cruise ship says isolation center is like ‘prison’

item.dc:creator: Berkeley Lovelace Jr.
item.description: Eli Lilly’s highly anticipated new weight loss drug, retatrutide, helped people lose up to 30% of their body weight, about 85 pounds, in a late-stage clinical trial, the drugmaker said in a news release Thursday

media:content.media:text: Eli Lilly headquarters in Indianapolis
media:content.media:description: Eli Lilly headquarters in Indianapolis.

item.title: People lost up to 85 pounds on Lilly’s experimental weight loss drug, company says

item.dc:creator: Reuters
item.description: Gaza flotilla activists who were detained by Israel and later pinned to the ground to the taunts of Israel’s far-right national security minister have been released from prison and will be deported to Turkey on Thursday, officials said.

media:content.media:text: A video posted by Israeli security minister Itamar Ben-Gvir shows a group of Gaza activists with their hands tied behind their backs, kneeling with their heads touching the floor, in what appears to be a makeshift detention area at Ashdod port and on the deck of a ship.
media:content.media:description: A video posted by Israeli security minister Itamar Ben-Gvir shows a group of Gaza activists with their hands tied behind their backs, kneeling with their heads touching the floor, in what appears to be a makeshift detention area at Ashdod port and on the deck of a ship.

media:content.media:text: A video posted by Israeli security minister Itamar Ben-Gvir shows a group of Gaza activists in what appears to be a makeshift detention area at Ashdod port.
media:content.media:description: A video posted by Israeli security minister Itamar Ben-Gvir shows a group of Gaza activists in what appears to be a makeshift detention area at Ashdod port.

media:content.media:text: Detained activists kneeling in rows with their hands zip-tied behind their backs, in what appears to be an outdoor Israeli port facility.
media:content.media:description: Detained activists kneeling in rows with their hands zip-tied behind their backs, in what appears to be an outdoor Israeli port facility.

media:content.media:text: Israeli security minister Itamar Ben-Gvir addresses a Gaza activist who has their hands tied and is kneeling on the floor.
media:content.media:description: Israeli security minister Itamar Ben-Gvir addresses a Gaza activist who has their hands tied and is kneeling on the floor.

item.title: Gaza flotilla activists to be deported from Israel as outrage grows over treatment

item.dc:creator: Jeremy Olshan
item.description: My journey through Shakespeare was guided by “Star Trek” star Patrick Stewart, who just recorded a new audiobook of the sonnets, and Claude AI.
item.title: Patrick Stewart, AI and I encountered the Bard. Resistance was futile.

item.dc:creator: Bridget Bowman
item.description: A Democratic outside group is unleashing an early attack on one of the contenders in the hotly contested Minnesota Senate primary, underscoring how the fight for the future of the party is reaching new heights.

media:content.media:text: Angie Craig
media:content.media:description: Rep. Angie Craig, D-Minn.

media:content.media:text: Peggy Flanagan
media:content.media:description: Rep. Angie Craig, D-Minn.

item.title: Democratic group launches ICE attack against Rep. Angie Craig in Minnesota Senate primary

item.dc:creator: Eric Samulski
item.description: The Savannah Bananas are known for entertaining baseball fans with dancing and singing. But players also want make sure their skill and competitiveness is front and center.

media:content.media:text: Derek Klena poses for a portrait
media:content.media:description: A pitcher throws on stilts during a Savannah Bananas game against the Party Animals at Yankee Stadium in New York in April.

media:content.media:text: Fans cheer during a Savannah Bananas baseball game.
media:content.media:description: A pitcher throws on stilts during a Savannah Bananas game against the Party Animals at Yankee Stadium in New York in April.

item.title: The Savannah Bananas are bringing joy, baseball and a second chance at a dream

item.dc:creator: Raquel Coronell Uribe
item.description: Republicans amended the bill to say President Trump may pick an alternative site for the museum and specified it could include only “biological women.”

media:content.media:credit: Politico via AP; Bloomberg via Getty Images
media:content.media:text: Teresa Leger Fernández and Rep. Nicole Malliotakis
media:content.media:description: Rep. Teresa Leger Fernández, D-N.M.; Rep. Nicole Malliotakis, R-N.Y.

item.title: Why Democrats have soured on a women’s history museum bill set for a House vote

item.dc:creator: Chloe Melas
item.description: Byron Allen’s “Comics Unleashed” will take over the timeslot held by “The Late Show with Stephen Colbert” following the host’s final episode on Thursday.

media:content.media:text: Byron Allen at 2026 AFI Life Achievement Awards in Hollywood, CA on April 18, 2026.
media:content.media:description: Byron Allen in Los Angeles on April 18.

media:content.media:text: The Late Show with Stephen Colbert
media:content.media:description: Byron Allen in Los Angeles on April 18.

item.title: Byron Allen on how CBS handed him Stephen Colbert’s ‘Late Show’ time slot

item.dc:creator: Cory Fernandez
item.description: The Ninja Creami is one of the best ice cream makers, but are there better options? I tested it against KitchenAid, Cuisinart Fast Freeze and more to find out.

media:content.media:credit: Courtesy of Cory Fernandez and Zoe Malin
media:content.media:text: The Ninja Creami is also available in a deluxe version, which makes more ice cream and has more pre-sets.
media:content.media:description: The Ninja Creami is also available in a deluxe version, which makes more ice cream and has more pre-sets.

media:content.media:credit: Courtesy of Cory Fernandez and Zoe Malin
media:content.media:text: The Ninja Creami is also available in a deluxe version, which makes more ice cream and has more pre-sets.
media:content.media:description: The Ninja Creami is also available in a deluxe version, which makes more ice cream and has more pre-sets.

media:content.media:text: The Ninja Creami on a granite table with the mixing paddle beside it.
media:content.media:description: The Ninja Creami is also available in a deluxe version, which makes more ice cream and has more pre-sets.

media:content.media:text: Cuisinart FastFreeze ice cream maker on a table.
media:content.media:description: The Ninja Creami is also available in a deluxe version, which makes more ice cream and has more pre-sets.

media:content.media:text: Light green KitchenAid Stand Mixer with ice cream maker attachment installed.
media:content.media:description: The Ninja Creami is also available in a deluxe version, which makes more ice cream and has more pre-sets.

media:content.media:text: The Cuisinart Ice Cream Maker
media:content.media:description: The Ninja Creami is also available in a deluxe version, which makes more ice cream and has more pre-sets.

media:content.media:text: The GreenPan Frost sitting on a table with the lid beside it.
media:content.media:description: The Ninja Creami is also available in a deluxe version, which makes more ice cream and has more pre-sets.

media:content.media:text: The Nutribullet Chill Ice Cream Maker on a table.
media:content.media:description: The Ninja Creami is also available in a deluxe version, which makes more ice cream and has more pre-sets.

item.title: I tested the Ninja Creami against five popular competitors, and the results shocked me

item.dc:creator: Bethany Heitman
item.description: Podiatrists say that Birkenstock Arizona sandals are some of the most comfortable shoes on the market thanks to the built-in arch support. Right now, get them for 40 percent off.

media:content.media:text: Birkenstock Arizona sandals have a contoured footbed with built-in arch support for comfort.
media:content.media:description: Birkenstock Arizona sandals have a contoured footbed with built-in arch support for comfort.

media:content.media:text: Birkenstock Arizona sandals have a contoured footbed with built-in arch support for comfort.
media:content.media:description: Birkenstock Arizona sandals have a contoured footbed with built-in arch support for comfort.

item.title: Deal of the Day: Birkenstock Arizona sandals are 40% off

item.dc:creator: Bianca Alvarez
item.description: Repair your skin barrier with dermatologist-recommended creams from brands including La Roche Posay, CeraVe, Drunk Elephant, Avène, Tatcha and more.

media:content.media:text: Repair and maintain a healthy skin barrier with dermatologist-recommended barrier creams from brands like Drunk Elephant, Kiehl’s, La Roche Posay and CeraVe.
media:content.media:description: Repair and maintain a healthy skin barrier with dermatologist-recommended barrier creams from brands like Drunk Elephant, Kiehl’s, La Roche Posay and CeraVe.

media:content.media:credit: Courtesy of Bianca Alvarez, NBC Select Associate Reporter
media:content.media:text: NBC Select associate reporter Bianca Alvarez swatches the peach-tinted cream on her hand to show the thick and rich consistency of the moisturizer.
media:content.media:description: Repair and maintain a healthy skin barrier with dermatologist-recommended barrier creams from brands like Drunk Elephant, Kiehl’s, La Roche Posay and CeraVe.

media:content.media:credit: Courtesy of Bianca Alvarez, NBC Select Associate Reporter
media:content.media:text: Alvarez squeezes out the Tower 28 SOS Daily Barrier Recovery Cream. In the picture on the right, Alvarez applies the moisturizer to her face.
media:content.media:description: Repair and maintain a healthy skin barrier with dermatologist-recommended barrier creams from brands like Drunk Elephant, Kiehl’s, La Roche Posay and CeraVe.

media:content.media:credit: Courtesy of Zoe Malin, NBC Select Associate Updates Editor
media:content.media:text: NBC Select associate updates editor Zoe Malin holds and applies the thin and white La Roche Posay Toleriane Double Repair Face Moisturizer to her face.
media:content.media:description: Repair and maintain a healthy skin barrier with dermatologist-recommended barrier creams from brands like Drunk Elephant, Kiehl’s, La Roche Posay and CeraVe.

media:content.media:text: Skinfix's Barrier Cream has one of the most nourishing formulas on our list, thanks to a combination of humectants, emollients and occlusives.
media:content.media:description: Repair and maintain a healthy skin barrier with dermatologist-recommended barrier creams from brands like Drunk Elephant, Kiehl’s, La Roche Posay and CeraVe.

item.title: Have you been damaging your skin barrier without knowing it?

item.dc:creator: Harry Rabinowitz
item.description: Shop the best early Memorial Day deals on mattresses, home appliances, beauty, tech and more from brands like Leesa, Ninja, Levoit, Supergoop and Apple.

media:content.media:text: Shop early Memorial Day deals early to avoid potential out of stock products and shipping delays.
